tools.name: matlab_editor_list
tools.title: List MATLAB Editor Documents
tools.description: List all files currently open in the MATLAB editor with their filenames and modification status.

tools.name: matlab_editor_active
tools.title: Get Active MATLAB Editor Document
tools.description: Get the active (focused) MATLAB editor document, including filename, modification status, selection region, and selected text.

tools.name: matlab_editor_selection
tools.title: Get Selected MATLAB Editor Text
tools.description: Get the text currently highlighted in the active MATLAB editor document.

tools.name: matlab_editor_read
tools.title: Read MATLAB Editor Document
tools.description: Read the contents of a file open in the MATLAB editor. Reflects unsaved edits. If no name is provided, reads the active file. Supports partial name matching.

name.description: File name or partial path to match. If omitted, reads the active file.
